verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge's reasoning is weak and circular. It relies entirely on the flawed consensus of the other agents (who all hallucinated a Central American context) to rule out the correct answer (Indonesia). The judge claims Malaysia/Indonesia are ruled out by 'road marking styles and vegetation density' being 'more characteristic of the Americas,' which is factually incorrect (Indonesia has identical road markings and vegetation). The judge fails to identify the hallucination in the agents' reasoning.
